sinks.expression:
printf(
			'<div id="joinchat_tab_%1$s" class="joinchat-tab %2$s" role="tabpanel" aria-labelledby="navtab_%1$s">',
			esc_attr( $tab_id ),
			esc_attr( $active_tab === $tab_id ? 'joinchat-tab-active' : '' )
		)

printf( '

Joinchat  %s %s

', esc_html__( 'You only need to add your WhatsApp number to contact with your users.', 'creame-whatsapp-me' ), sprintf( '%s', esc_url( Joinchat_Util::admin_url() ), esc_html__( 'Go to settings', 'creame-whatsapp-me' ) ) )

printf(
				'<script>jQuery("#joinchat-empty-phone").on("click", ".notice-dismiss", function () {' .
				'jQuery.post(ajaxurl, { action: "joinchat_notice_dismiss", nonce: "%s"}, null, "json");' .
				'});</script>',
				esc_js( wp_create_nonce( 'joinchat_nonce' ) )
			)
printf( '%s', esc_url( Joinchat_Util::link( 'wp-coupon', 'coupon' ) ), esc_html__( 'Unlock Extra Features, NOW ON SALE', 'creame-whatsapp-me' ) )

printf( '
%s
', esc_html( jc_common()->settings['woo_btn_text'] ) )

sanitizers.expression: wp_kses( /* translators: %s: User display name. */ _x( "Hey, %s. Let's set up Joinchat in less than 2 minutes.", 'onboard', 'creame-whatsapp-me' ), array( 'em' => array(), 'strong' => array(), ) )
esc_textarea( __( "Hi *{SITE}*! I need more info about {TITLE} {URL}\n\n_Sent with Joinchat_", 'creame-whatsapp-me' ) )
wp_kses( _x( 'I accept the terms of use and privacy policy', 'onboard', 'creame-whatsapp-me' ), Joinchat_Admin::KSES_LINK )
wp_kses( __( "WhatsApp contact number (the button will not be shown if it's empty)", 'creame-whatsapp-me' ), array( 'strong' => array() ) )
wp_kses( __( 'You can find examples and more tricks here.', 'creame-whatsapp-me' ), Joinchat_Admin::KSES_LINK )
wp_kses( __( 'We recommend to use the ID that resizes the image to the exact size of the chatbox.', 'creame-whatsapp-me' ), array( 'strong' => array() ) )
wp_kses( __( 'You can set custom phone and initial message with attributes %1$s and %2$s.', 'creame-whatsapp-me' ), array( 'strong' => array() ) )

wp_kses( __( 'If you need help, first check the documentation and if you don\'t find the solution you can consult the plugin\'s free support forum.', 'creame-whatsapp-me' ), Joinchat_Admin::KSES_LINK )
wp_kses( __( 'You can also buy Joinchat Premium with one year of support service included.', 'creame-whatsapp-me' ), array( 'strong' => array() ) + Joinchat_Admin::KSES_LINK )
wp_kses( __( 'WooCommerce, in product pages you can also use:', 'creame-whatsapp-me' ), array( 'strong' => array() ) )
wp_kses( __( 'For the Call to Action for Products on Sale, you can also use:', 'creame-whatsapp-me' ), array( 'strong' => array() ) )
